title: Char Siu Egg Bao
description: A classic Cantonese breakfast or snack dish featuring a soft egg and sweet char siu filling in a fluffy bao.
instructions: Preheat a steamer with a heatproof plate.
Place the bao dough pieces on the plate, cover with a clean cloth.
Steam for 10-12 minutes or until the bao is soft and fluffy.
In a separate pan, heat the char siu sauce over low heat.
Add the char siu filling and stir until heated through.
Crack an egg into a small bowl.
Once the bao is cooked, place a piece on a flat surface.
Create a small well in the center of the bao.
Pour the egg into the well and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the whites are set.
Add a spoonful of the char siu filling on top of the egg.
